before.title: Substantiate self-optimization behavior with governed tests
before.description: Add explicit tests and benchmarks proving that access can cool memory, reduce decay, and improve routing so thermodynamic claims are substantiated instead of rhetorical.
acceptance: Validation covers zero-decay saturation, partial-saturation decay, and routing thresholds.
Evidence shows repeated access can improve retention characteristics.
Thermodynamic behavior is queryable in test output and audit evidence.
